meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Lev8
products.tagline: Find, research, and reach the right people
products.summaryZh: 找到、研究并触达正确的人群。
products.descriptionZh: 与Lev8对话，这是通过并行AI代理在互联网各个角落进行实时网络搜索，快速找到并联系目标人群和公司的最快方式。通过瀑布式查找丰富CSV数据，监控意图信号，并自动发送个性化多渠道消息。
products.description: Chat with Lev8, the fastest way to find and reach your target people and companies, powered by live web search via parallel AI agents across every corner of the internet. Enrich CSVs with waterfall lookups, monitor intent signals, and send personalized multi-channel messages, all running automatically.

products.name: CartAI
products.tagline: The AI agent that handles checkout.
products.summaryZh: 处理结账的AI代理。
products.descriptionZh: 结账是难点，多数方案仅能在商家已集成的场景下完成。CartAI 可在任意商家的实时界面完成结账，无需商家侧配合，与机器人检测机制协作而非规避。一套开发者优先的 API，四个产品：Catalog（跨商家搜索与实时定价）、Checkouts（完成结账并追踪订单至确认）、Payments（通过 Visa 和 Mastercard 代理通道实现 PCI 合规）、Monetization（每笔代理销售获取佣金）。
products.description: Checkout is the hard part, and most solutions clear it only where the merchant has integrated. CartAI completes checkout on any live merchant surface with no merchant-side work, cooperating with bot detection instead of evading it. One developer-first API, four products: Catalog (search and live pricing across merchants), Checkouts (clear and track orders to confirmation), Payments (PCI off your stack via Visa and Mastercard agent rails), Monetization (commissions on every agent sale).

products.name: ditto.site
products.tagline: Clone any website into clean code. Free & open source
products.summaryZh: 克隆任意网站为干净代码。免费且开源。
products.descriptionZh: 将 Ditto 指向任意公开 URL，几分钟内即可获得一份忠实还原的干净、组件化的 Next.js 或 Vite 代码副本。整个过程完全确定性，因此快速、廉价且一致。包含组件、令牌、交互及悬停状态。提供免费 REST API 与 MCP 服务器，开源。
products.description: Point Ditto at any public URL and get a faithful copy as clean, componentized Next.js or Vite code, in minutes. It's fully deterministic, so it's fast, cheap, and consistent. Components, tokens, interactions & hover states included. Free REST API + MCP server, open source.

products.name: Rerun
products.tagline: The easiest way to build AI agents for all your tasks
products.summaryZh: 构建AI智能体以完成所有任务的最简单方式
products.descriptionZh: 大多数AI代理都是黑箱，但Rerun不是。构建全天候运行的无代码代理，自动追踪发票、筛选潜在客户、清理收件箱，并实时监控每一步操作。涉及敏感操作时会暂停等待审批。每个工作区配备独立私有服务器。可使用内置模型，或接入自有API密钥及订阅服务。
products.description: Most AI agents are black boxes. Rerun isn't. Build no-code agents that run 24/7, chasing invoices, qualifying leads, clearing your inbox, and watch every step in real time. They pause for approval before anything sensitive. Each workspace gets its own private server. Start with the included model, or connect your own API key or subscription

products.name: Phantomstory
products.tagline: Launch a third-party blog to win AEO with just two clicks
products.summaryZh: 只需两次点击，即可启动第三方博客赢得AEO
products.descriptionZh: Phantomstory 帮助团队在5分钟内于全新域名上发布第三方博客，从而赢得AEO。只需两次点击，Phantomstory即可配置可信内容中心，逐步发布适配AI搜索的文章。秘诀何在？部分由专家撰写的文章旨在帮助大语言模型发现、理解并推荐您的公司。别再仅将AEO视为监控问题；借助Phantomstory，将AEO转化为切实推动成果的行动方案。
products.description: Phantomstory helps teams win AEO by launching third-party blogs on fresh domains in under 5 minutes. With just two clicks, Phantomstory provisions credible content hubs that incrementally publish AI-search-ready articles. The secret? A portion of these expertly-written articles are designed to help LLMs discover, understand, and recommend your company. Stop thinking about AEO as just a monitoring problem; with Phantomstory, transform AEO into an actionable plan that actually drives results.

products.name: Routine AI
products.tagline: Control work with your voice. The Siri for work.
products.summaryZh: 用语音掌控工作。工作中的Siri。
products.descriptionZh: Routine AI 让你通过语音控制任务、日历、笔记和项目。只需自然对话，即可安排会议、添加提醒、捕捉灵感、撰写笔记、搜索知识、更新项目并自动化重复性工作。
products.description: Routine AI lets you control your tasks, calendar, notes and projects using your voice. Just talk naturally to schedule meetings, add reminders, capture ideas, write notes, search your knowledge, update projects and automate repetitive work.

products.name: Jockey by TwelveLabs
products.tagline: The video AI agent that understands your whole library
products.summaryZh: 理解你整个视频库的AI智能体
products.descriptionZh: Jockey 是首款能像你一样理解整个媒体库的AI，可跨所有拍摄的照片和视频，按人物、时刻或场景进行搜索。基于TwelveLabs的先进模型栈，Jockey每次更新都会自动优化。无论你需要通过MCP连接Claude/ChatGPT，还是使用我们的API构建自定义应用，Jockey都能让你的媒体库实现即时搜索与访问。
products.description: Jockey is the first AI that understands your entire media library just like you do, searching by person, moment, or context across every photo and video you've captured. Powered by TwelveLabs' advanced model stack, Jockey improves automatically with every update. Whether you need to connect via MCP for Claude/ChatGPT or build custom applications using our API, Jockey makes your media library instantly searchable and accessible.

products.name: CreateOS Sandbox
products.tagline: Instant, hardware Isolated Sandboxes for AI agents
products.summaryZh: 为AI代理提供即时、硬件隔离的沙箱环境
products.descriptionZh: CreateOS Sandbox 为AI智能体构建者提供快速、安全、硬件隔离的沙箱环境，启动时间约30毫秒（p90）。我们提供CLI工具包、SDK、50余个SDK真实场景示例、Claude插件、computeSDK集成等更多功能。
products.description: CreateOS Sandbox gives AI agent builders their own fast, secure, hardware isolated, sandbox in ~30ms (p90). We have suit of CLI, SDK, 50+ SDK real world examples, claude plugins, computeSDK integration, and more

products.name: Skim
products.tagline: Free, open-source AI email client for Windows
products.summaryZh: 免费开源的 Windows 人工智能邮件客户端
products.descriptionZh: Skim 是一款免费开源（MIT 协议）的 Windows 邮件客户端。✂️ 刻意精简：无日历、无规则引擎、无冗余功能。更少按钮，更低认知负荷。⚡ 原生 Rust 内核（Tauri 2）：安装包约 5 MB，冷启动低于 1 秒，全文搜索即时响应。🔒 本地优先，支持离线使用，零遥测。✦ AI 由你掌控：自带 Anthropic 或 OpenRouter 密钥，Skim 即可用你的口吻草拟回复，并针对整个邮箱内容解答问题。
products.description: Skim is a free, open-source (MIT) email client for Windows. ✂️ Minimal on purpose: no calendar, no rules engine, no bloat. Fewer buttons, less cognitive load. ⚡ Native Rust core (Tauri 2): ~5 MB installer, sub-second cold start, instant full-text search. 🔒 Local-first, offline-ready, zero telemetry. ✦ AI on your terms: bring your own Anthropic or OpenRouter key and Skim drafts replies in your voice and answers questions across your whole mailbox.

products.name: Bolna Agent Studio
products.tagline: Build Voice AI Agent in 10 Minutes
products.summaryZh: 10分钟搭建语音AI智能体
products.descriptionZh: Bolna的Agent Studio让任何企业都能在几分钟内构建并部署生产级语音AI代理，无需提示工程。上传文档或回答几个引导性问题，Studio即可从经过生产验证的模块中组装出可立即通话的代理。注册后即可在当天开始通话。
products.description: Bolna's Agent Studio lets any business build and deploy a production-grade voice AI agent in minutes, no prompt engineering. Upload a doc or answer a few guided questions, and Studio assembles a call-ready agent from production-tested modules. Sign up and start calling on Day 0.

products.name: Manifest
products.tagline: Turn any webpage into an action manifest for AI agents
products.summaryZh: 将任意网页转化为AI代理的行动清单。
products.descriptionZh: Manifest 可将任意网页转化为结构化 JSON 映射，清晰标注 AI 代理可点击、填写和提交的内容。仅需一次 API 调用，无需脆弱的元素选择器。每个操作都附带解析后的 CSS/角色定位器，以及用于编码元素间依赖关系的 requires 字段（例如“先选择套餐，此按钮才可点击”）。这是上下文 aria 快照无法提供的信息。内置 Python SDK、LangChain 支持及 MCP 服务器。专为部署浏览器代理的开发者打造。
products.description: Manifest turns any webpage into a structured JSON map of what an AI agent can click, fill, and submit. One API call, no fragile selectors. Every action comes with resolved CSS/role locators, plus a requires field that encodes dependencies between elements (e.g. "select a plan before this button is clickable"). That's context aria snapshots don't give you. Python SDK, LangChain support, and an MCP server included. Built for anyone shipping browser agents.

products.name: Topolines
products.tagline: Generate Topologic contours
products.summaryZh: 生成拓扑等高线
products.descriptionZh: 绘制区域，生成清晰的地形等高线，并导出适合打印的SVG和HD PNG格式。支持渐变、高程渐变以及适配Figma的输出。
products.description: Draw a zone, generate crisp topographic contour lines, and export print-ready SVG & HD PNG. Gradients, elevation taper and Figma-ready output.

products.name: OpenChatCut
products.tagline: Open-source AI agent video editor with a real timeline
products.summaryZh: 开源AI智能体视频编辑器，配备实时时间线
products.descriptionZh: OpenChatCut 是一个开源的 ChatCut 替代方案：采用本地优先的 AI 视频编辑方式，Codex、Claude 和 MCP 代理可在真实的多轨时间线上协同工作。支持免费、可编辑的导出，采用 AGPL 协议。
products.description: OpenChatCut is an open-source ChatCut alternative: local-first AI video editing where Codex, Claude, and MCP agents work on a real multitrack timeline. Free, editable exports, AGPL.

products.name: tterm
products.tagline: A terminal, a real browser, and Claude Code under one roof
products.summaryZh: 一个终端、一个真正的浏览器，以及Claude Code，尽在一处。
products.descriptionZh: tterm 是 macOS 上用于操作 Claude Code 的控制台。每个项目都包含一行资源管理器、Claude 和文件查看器。你可以根据需要堆叠任意多个项目。内部运行真实的 Chromium 浏览器，并且刻意不内置编辑器：你可以逐段审查差异并提交。它甚至能自我重建。向 Claude 面板请求某个功能后，正在运行的应用会热加载该功能。无需账户，无遥测。对业余爱好者免费，支持 Apple 芯片。
products.description: tterm is a macOS cockpit for working with Claude Code. Every project is a row of explorer, Claude, and file viewer. Stack as many as you're juggling. A real Chromium browser lives inside, and there's no editor on purpose: you review diffs hunk by hunk and commit. It even rebuilds itself. Ask the Claude pane for a feature and the running app hot-reloads with it. No account, no telemetry. Free for hobbyists, on Apple silicon.

products.name: Routebase
products.tagline: Catch API drift before your customers do
products.summaryZh: 在客户发现之前，捕获 API 漂移
products.descriptionZh: 你的 API 存在于设计工具、文档、模拟数据、测试、监控中——每个副本都会逐渐偏离。Routebase 将它们统一为一个动态源：修改规范、发布，它便会捕捉到偏离之处。（你的 AI 代理通过 MCP 读取同一源。）
products.description: Your API lives in your design tool, your docs, your mocks, your tests, your monitoring — and every copy drifts. Routebase makes them one living source: change the spec, publish, and it catches what drifted. (Your AI agents read the same source over MCP.)

products.name: DualStream
products.tagline: Simultaneous desktop and mobile streaming, the easy way.
products.summaryZh: 轻松实现桌面与移动端同步直播。
products.descriptionZh: 优雅而强大的直播体验，简单得令人惊叹。DualStream 通过单一专利引擎，同时向桌面端和移动端观众传输内容。DualStream Relay 从我们的服务器将您的直播推送至每个平台——即便网络连接出现短暂中断，断线保护功能也能确保直播持续进行。原生提醒、独立音源控制、VTuber 支持、即时回放片段、影院级特效、弹出式多平台聊天等众多功能均已内置。
products.description: Beautifully powerful streaming. Astonishingly easy. DualStream brings Desktop and Mobile audiences your content at the same time, from a single patent-pending engine. DualStream Relay carries your broadcast to every platform from our servers — and if your connection blinks, disconnection protection keeps your stream alive. Native Alerts, Per-Source audio control, VTuber support, instant replay clips, cinema grade effects, pop-out multi-platform chat and so much more is all built in.

products.name: Tidy
products.tagline: Your Mac tidies itself: screenshots, installers, Downloads
products.summaryZh: 你的 Mac 会自动整理：截图、安装包、下载内容
products.descriptionZh: Tidy 常驻菜单栏，替你处理三个重复的手动操作：自动归档桌面新截图，通过设备端 OCR 根据内容重命名——"Screenshot 14.22.10.png" 变成 "invoice-march.png"；弹出已装载的 dmg 并清理安装包；按类型整理新下载文件，规则用日常英语编写。Apple Intelligence 在设备端构建规则，数据不会离开你的 Mac。仅处理新文件，从不删除。一次性付费 9 美元，无需订阅。
products.description: Tidy lives in your menu bar and handles three chores you keep doing by hand. It archives new Desktop screenshots, renaming them from their content with on-device OCR — "Screenshot 14.22.10.png" becomes "invoice-march.png". It ejects thedmg you mounted and trashes the installer. It sorts new Downloads by type, with rules you write in plain English. Apple Intelligence builds them on-device, so nothing leaves your Mac. Only touches new files. Never deletes. $9 once, no subscription.

products.name: Universal Dictation on Stream
products.tagline: Private Voice Ring for dictation across iOS & Mac
products.summaryZh: iOS 与 Mac 跨设备听写专用私密语音铃声
products.descriptionZh: Stream 推出通用听写功能。跨 iOS 和 Mac 的即按即说：即刻生效，无需切换应用，无需重新连接。我们打造了 Notes 以确保内容不丢失，Chat 则让你能边想边说。借助听写功能，你的声音可抵达任何地方。Notes、Chat、听写——尽在一个语音环中。
products.description: Introducing Universal Dictation on Stream. Push-to-talk across iOS and Mac: Instantly. No app switching, no reconnection. We built Notes so nothing gets lost, and Chat so you can think out loud. With Dictation, your voice goes anywhere. Notes, Chat, Dictation—in one voice ring

products.name: ProtoFlow
products.tagline: AI-powered PCB design tool for engineers and hardware teams
products.summaryZh: 面向工程师与硬件团队的AI驱动PCB设计工具
products.descriptionZh: ProtoFlow是电子设计的新起点，专为个人工程师和团队打造。通过其强大的AI助手、通用元件搜索、自定义元件生成以及多人协作工具，ProtoFlow优化了PCB设计流程，将开发时间缩短数小时。该服务免费使用，提供全功能平台，并能顺畅导出至KiCad和Altium等软件，让任何技能水平的用户都能充分优化其硬件设计。
products.description: ProtoFlow is the new step zero for electronic design, built for individual engineers and teams. Through its powerful AI assistant, universal component search, custom component generation, and multiplayer collaboration tools, ProtoFlow optimizes the PCB design process, slicing hours off development. The service is free to use, offers a full-suite platform, and exports smoothly to software like KiCad and Altium, allowing users at any skill level to fully optimize their hardware designs.

products.name: PieceKeeper
products.tagline: Track your music repertoire and practice
products.summaryZh: 追踪你的音乐曲目与练习记录
products.descriptionZh: 再也不会遗漏任何曲目。PieceKeeper帮助音乐人管理曲目库，根据个性化练习计划进行专注练习，获取练习数据洞察与趋势分析，并通过旨在提升读谱与听力技能的互动训练和练习来学习乐理知识。
products.description: Never lose track of a piece again. PieceKeeper helps musicians manage their repertoire, run focused practice sessions based on a customized practice schedule, get insights and trends about their practice, and learn music theory through interactive drills and exercises aimed at improving both reading and listening skills.
